name: technical-knockout
description: Agent-native architecture reference system for open-source project evaluation, build-vs-buy, and source-backed architecture learning.

interface.shortDescription: Use TK reports, comparisons, source cache, and build-vs-buy evidence in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Technical Knockout helps Codex evaluate open-source projects, compare architecture patterns, avoid repeated wheel-building, and cite source-backed evidence from local TK reports and cloned project caches.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Technical Knockout to evaluate this architecture or dependency decision.
